_description: Turkish standard dimensions and fitment for household appliances. All measurements in centimeters unless noted.

kitchen.notes: Turkish kitchens follow European standards. IKEA Metod system fits standard Turkish kitchen dimensions.

standard_60cm.connection: Cold water inlet, drain hose, 220V plug
standard_60cm.notes: Most common size. Fits under standard 85cm countertop with adjustable feet.

narrow_45cm.connection: Cold water inlet, drain hose, 220V plug
narrow_45cm.notes: For smaller kitchens. Less common, fewer models available. Arçelik, Beko, Bosch offer 45cm options.

built_in_60cm.notes: Requires furniture panel. Niche depth must be at least 57cm. Check hinge type compatibility.

standard_front_load.connection: Cold water inlet, drain hose, 220V plug (some models 16A)
standard_front_load.notes: 60cm width is universal in Turkey. Slim (45cm depth) popular for small bathrooms.

washer_dryer_combo.notes: Drying capacity always less than wash capacity. Popular where separate dryer space unavailable.

top_load.notes: Rare in Turkey. Mostly older models or budget segment.

standard.notes: Heat pump most efficient but expensive. Condenser needs no vent. Can stack on washing machine with stacking kit.

standard_60cm.notes: Most common in Turkish homes. Fits standard 60cm niche.

wide_70cm.notes: Popular for larger families. Verify kitchen niche width.

side_by_side_90cm.notes: American style. Requires 90cm+ niche. Check door swing clearance. Popular in modern Turkish apartments.

french_door.notes: Premium segment. Same width requirements as side-by-side.

built_in.notes: Fits inside 60cm cabinet column. Requires specific furniture panels. Measure niche precisely.

built_in_standard.notes: Standard 60cm niche. Most common in Turkish kitchens. Fits IKEA Metod 60cm tall cabinet.

built_in_compact.notes: Compact oven. Can be combined with compact microwave in same column.

freestanding_with_cooktop.notes: Classic ocaklı fırın. 50cm for small kitchens, 60cm standard. Natural gas or LPG conversion kits available.

standard_builtin.notes: Gas most common in Turkey (doğalgaz). Induction growing. Check countertop cutout dimensions carefully.

cooktop.gas_notes: Turkish gas connection: doğalgaz (natural gas) standard. LPG dönüşüm seti (conversion kit) included with most cooktops for rural areas.

range_hood.notes: Width should match or exceed cooktop width. 60cm hood for 60cm cooktop minimum. Turkish kitchens often have external ventilation ducts -- check building regulations.

split_system.notes: Inverter models strongly recommended. Outdoor unit placement may need apartment yönetim (building management) approval. Installation by authorized technician required for warranty.

wall_mount.notes: Check VESA pattern before buying mount. Turkish apartments: concrete/brick walls need proper anchoring.

size_guide.viewing_distance_formula: TV diagonal (cm) x 1.5 = minimum viewing distance for 4K
